data.name: A/B Test Analyzer
data.description: Analyzes A/B test results with proper statistical methods, determining significance and recommending next actions.
data.readme:
## A/B Test Analyzer

Runs Bayesian and frequentist statistical tests on experiment data. Calculates effect sizes, confidence intervals, and sample size requirements. Recommends ship/iterate/extend decisions.
data.author: TestSignal
